name: Coin Flip
description: Monte Carlo coin-flip sketch — accumulates the empirical distribution of heads-runs and the distribution of the longest heads-run, overlaid against the theoretical curves. The first figure in the LogLog/HLL pedagogical arc.

charmiq.command.name: play
charmiq.command.description: Start the auto-flip loop (no-op if already playing). Returns the running state.

charmiq.command.name: pause
charmiq.command.description: Pause the auto-flip loop (no-op if already paused). Returns the running state.

charmiq.command.name: step
charmiq.command.description: Advance the simulation by one flip. Returns the flip and the post-step snapshot — useful for an agent that wants to drive the experiment without polling.

charmiq.command.name: reset
charmiq.command.description: Clear all accumulated state and pause. Optionally re-seeds the PRNG; omit `seed` to keep the current seed (deterministic replay).

seed.description: 32-bit integer PRNG seed. Omit to keep the current seed.

charmiq.command.name: setSeed
charmiq.command.description: Replace the PRNG seed and reset accumulated state. Returns the new seed. Use this to make an embedded figure reproducible across page loads.

charmiq.command.name: setDelay
charmiq.command.description: Set the inter-flip delay in milliseconds (clamped to ≥1). Returns the applied value.
